raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un usnehim to pehz trim
Gaddeim/ festā Gaddā Iṣtijus/
tas trr tas dewihts Gads Oṣe-
us ta Israēka Rehnina/ tad tap-
ve Samarija usneimta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas Rehninsch no Affi-
rijas aiswedde Israēlu uhs Affi-
riju/ un likke tohs eeksch Alas un
Abora pee Gosana Uppes/ un to
Meedernu Pilsfaktos dshwoht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tapehz ka tee ta KUN-
GA fawa Deewa Balsi ne bij
flautijschi/ bet winna Derribu
pabrkahpujschi/ ar wiṣu/ ke
Motsus ta KUNGA Kalps bij
paweblejs/ un tee ne bij neds
flautijschi neds to darrijschi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Zettortā padesmitā Gad-
dā ta Rehnina Iṣtijus/ zeblahs
Saneribs tas Rehninsch no Affi-
rijas prett wiṣeem stipreem Pils-
fahterim Juhda/ un usnehim
tohs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fuhttija Iṣtijus tas
Rehninsch no Juhda/ pee to Reh-
niu no Affirijas uhs Lakifn/ un
ikke sazzibt: Es efimu apgrehko
ees/ greesecs atpattatz no man-
is/ es paneffichu/ ko tu man
eslikfi. Tad uslikke tas Reh-
ninsch no Affirijas Iṣtijum tam
Rehninam no Juhda/ trihsfints
Talentus Sudraba/ un trihsdej-
nits Talentus Selta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad dewe Iṣtijus wiṣu
Sudrabu/ kas eeksch ta KUN-
GA Namma/ un eeksch ta Reh-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tamni Lakifā nolausfija
Iṣtijus (to Selts) nota KUN-
GA Namma Durwin/ ir tahs
Skahrdas/ ko Iṣtijus tas Reh-
ninsch no Juhda bij pahrwilzis/
un dewe to tam Rehninam no
Affirijas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tatschu fuhttija tas Reh-
ninsch no Affirijas Tartann/ un
to augstu Waldonu/ un Rabsa-
fu no Lakifa us to Rehninu Iṣ-
tiju/ ar leelu Karra-Spehku uhs
Jerusaēmi/ un tee zeblehhs/ un
nahze us Jerusaēmi. Un kad
tee bij zebluschees vn atnahku-
cht/ tad pastahweja tee pee to
Uhdens Grabivi ta augschaka
Dihka/ kas bija Leel-Zetta Mal-
lā/ pee ta Wadnalneeka Tib-
ruma.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tee aizinaaja to Rehni-
an/ tad isgahje pee tecm Elija-
kims Iṣtijus Dehls/ tas Aumei-
sterfs/ un Sebena tas Strihwe-
ris/ un Joaks Afapa Dehls tas
Kanzleris.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Rabsakus sazzija us
teem: Sakkajt jelle Iṣtijum. Ta-
takka tas leelajs Rehninsch/ tas
chninsch no Affirijas: Kas tas
tahds Patwerums us ko tu pa-
ranjees?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tu fakki/ ( tatthu ta irr
weena weltiga Walloda/ gann
Badohma un Spehka irr kar-
roht? Us ko tu nu pataujees/ ka
tu no man efi utkahpees?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Nu rangi/ woj tu patau-
jees
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
